title.en: China-to-Saint Lucia BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入圣卢西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入聖露西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Saint Lucia SLBS standards-body requirements, NURC utility regulatory requirements, LUCELEC grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 international safety standards expected in project specifications, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation framework, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and Saint Lucia's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid and tropical maritime environment — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与圣卢西亚SLBS标准机构要求、NURC公用事业监管要求、LUCELEC并网要求、项目规格中预期的IEC 62619和IEC 63056国际安全标准、NFPA 855消防安全安装框架、UN 38.3及IEC 62281运输要求，以及圣卢西亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网和热带海洋环境——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與聖露西亞SLBS標準機構要求、NURC公用事業監管要求、LUCELEC併網要求、項目規格中預期的IEC 62619和IEC 63056國際安全標準、NFPA 855消防安全安裝框架、UN 38.3及IEC 62281運輸要求，以及聖露西亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網和熱帶海洋環境——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SLBS conformity scope determination, NURC regulatory approval, LUCELEC grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Saint Lucia SLBS mandatory standards, NURC energy regulatory requirements, LUCELEC grid-connection technical specifications, Saint Lucia building authority fire-safety requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SLBS合格评定范围裁定、NURC监管批准、LUCELEC并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行圣卢西亚SLBS强制标准、NURC能源监管要求、LUCELEC并网技术规格、圣卢西亚建筑主管机关消防安全要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SLBS合格評定範圍裁定、NURC監管批准、LUCELEC併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行聖露西亞SLBS強制標準、NURC能源監管要求、LUCELEC併網技術規格、聖露西亞建築主管機關消防安全要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Saint Lucia does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. BESS projects in Saint Lucia operate primarily under IEC international standards referenced in LUCELEC interconnection agreements, NURC oversight, and NFPA-referenced fire-safety requirements. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Saint Lucia are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for LUCELEC project acceptance — Chinese GB 44240-2024 alone is not sufficient; (2) IEC 63056 system-level battery safety requirements where referenced in project specifications; (3) LUCELEC and NURC grid-connection approval including re-parameterisation and retesting of PCS for Saint Lucia's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid — note that although China and Saint Lucia both use 50 Hz, the voltage differs (China is 220/380 V); (4) fire-safety installation approval from the Saint Lucia Building Authority under an NFPA 855-aligned framework, combined with hurricane wind-load and tropical salt-mist corrosion design requirements; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation and IEC 62281 compliance mandatory for sea freight via Port Castries under the IMDG Code; and (6) tropical maritime environment derating for salt mist, high humidity, and sustained high ambient temperature. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in LUCELEC, NURC, or project-owner review.
answer_first.zh: 圣卢西亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。圣卢西亚的BESS项目主要依据LUCELEC并网协议、NURC监管及基于NFPA的消防安全要求中引用的IEC国际标准运作。中国BESS出口圣卢西亚的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为LUCELEC项目验收的国际预期基准——仅持有中国GB 44240-2024认证不足；（2）项目规格中引用的IEC 63056系统级电池安全要求；（3）LUCELEC和NURC并网批准，包括针对圣卢西亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网对PCS进行重新参数配置和重新测试——注意尽管中国与圣卢西亚同为50 Hz，但电压不同（中国为220/380 V）；（4）圣卢西亚建筑管理局在NFPA 855框架下的消防安全安装审批，结合飓风风荷载和热带盐雾腐蚀设计要求；（5）依据IMDG规则经卡斯特里港海运所强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件和IEC 62281合规；（6）针对盐雾、高湿度和持续高环境温度的热带海洋环境降额。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是生产基准，但在LUCELEC、NURC或项目业主审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 聖露西亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。聖露西亞的BESS項目主要依據LUCELEC併網協議、NURC監管及基於NFPA的消防安全要求中引用的IEC國際標準運作。中國BESS出口聖露西亞的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為LUCELEC項目驗收的國際預期基準——僅持有中國GB 44240-2024認證不足；（2）項目規格中引用的IEC 63056系統級電池安全要求；（3）LUCELEC和NURC併網批准，包括針對聖露西亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網對PCS進行重新參數配置和重新測試——注意儘管中國與聖露西亞同為50 Hz，但電壓不同（中國為220/380 V）；（4）聖露西亞建築管理局在NFPA 855框架下的消防安全安裝審批，結合颶風風荷載和熱帶鹽霧腐蝕設計要求；（5）依據IMDG規則經卡斯特里港海運所強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件和IEC 62281合規；（6）針對鹽霧、高濕度和持續高環境溫度的熱帶海洋環境降額。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是製造基準，但在LUCELEC、NURC或項目業主審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
